sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_normalization (input String, normalized String);
INSERT INTO test_normalization (input, normalized) VALUES ('â', normalizeUTF8NFKC('â'));
SELECT input, normalized, length(normalized) AS nfkc_length FROM test_normalization;
UPDATE test_normalization SET normalized = normalizeUTF8NFKC(input) WHERE input != normalized;
SELECT input, normalizeUTF8NFKC(input) AS nfkc_output FROM test_normalization WHERE length(normalized) > 0;
